title: 100pk 12" Universal Utility Cable Zip Ties 4mm Thickness
description:
These Universal Cable Ties come in handy around the house, garage, or office with strong holding capability to keep your things in order! Keep cables, wires, hoses and more neatly together with these 12"x 4.2mm white cable zip ties. Coming in packs of 100, you'll be able to keep things organized anywhere. They are made of a durable plastic that utilizes strong lock hold technology to carry anything up to 110lbs.
